prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（含物理类）最低位次分别为 550→549→586→416→394，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧）。2024 年大幅跃升至 416 名，2025 年进一步升至 394 名，近两年累计前移约 192 名，表明该校在内蒙古理科生中的吸引力持续增强；本省理科招生计划 2021–2023 年约 65–67 人，2024 年降至 57 人，2025 年（物理类）52 人，2026 年50 人，呈逐年小幅缩招趋势。缩招意味着名额减少，竞争进一步加剧，位次数字有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京理工大学为 985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名从 2021 年第 19 位持续上升至 2025 年第 13 位、2026 年第 14 位，稳居全国顶尖理工类高校前列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及师德师风事件（宫琳事件等），但学校舆情应对较为高效；抖音热度排名第 47 位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，整体报考关注度未出现明显负面冲击；拥有信息与通信工程（A+）、控制科学与工程（A+）、计算机科学与技术（A）、 机械工程（A）、材料科学与工程（A）、光学工程（A）等 12 个 A- 及以上学科，与招生专业高度匹配，工科实力突出，对理科考生有强劲吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业在 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，与北理工优势学科高度契合，推高报考热度；内蒙古 2026 年普通高考总人数约 15.4 万人，按近年物理类占比约 72% 估算约 11.1 万人，较 2025 年物理类 8.37 万人明显增加，竞争基数扩大；北京理工大学位于北京市，对内蒙古考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生人数占比较小（约 50–65 人），属于跨省招生中的中等规模，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 394 名、2026 年计划缩招 2 人（缩招约 3.8%）、软科排名持续高位、工科专业热度高涨、本省考生总数增加等因素，预计 2026 年竞争进一步加剧，位次继续前移。预测最低位次约 378 名，区间 340–416 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越班）
- 工科试验班（未来精工技术）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（徐特立英才班）
- 工科试验班（信息科学技术）
- 工科试验班（电子信息实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（航空航天与机电类）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能车辆菁英班）
- 理科试验班（理学与材料菁英班）
- 经济管理试验班。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 340–416 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于 378 名（即数字更小）可重点冲刺卓越班、未来精工技术等一档专业；位次在 378–416 名之间建议以徐特立英才班、信息科学技术等二档专业为主；位次接近 416 名可考虑三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were 550→549→586→416→394, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing, competition intensifying). In 2024, there was a significant leap to 416th place, and in 2025, it further rose to 394th place, with a cumulative advance of about 192 places in the last two years, indicating that the university's appeal among science students in Inner Mongolia continues to strengthen; the provincial science enrollment plan was about 65–67 students from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 57 in 2024, 52 (physics category) in 2025, and 50 in 2026, showing a gradual slight reduction trend year by year. Reduced enrollment means fewer spots, further intensifying competition, putting upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science China University ranking has risen from 19th in 2021 to 13th in 2025 and 14th in 2026, consistently ranking among the top elite science and engineering universities in China, strongly attracting high-scoring students; in 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (Gong Lin incident, etc.), but the university's public relations response has been relatively efficient; Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, and overall application attention has not shown significant negative impact; it has 12 A- and above disciplines including Information and Communication Engineering (A+), Control Science and Engineering (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Materials Science and Engineering (A), Optical Engineering (A), etc., highly matching its enrollment majors, with outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, closely aligning with BIT's advantageous disciplines, boosting application enthusiasm; in 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, with an estimated 111,000 in the physics category based on the recent proportion of about 72%, a significant increase from 83,700 in 2025, expanding the competition base; Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Inner Mongolian candidates; the university's enrollment in Inner Mongolia accounts for a relatively small proportion (about 50–65 students), a medium scale among cross-provincial enrollments, with regional preference having a neutral to slightly positive impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 394, a planned reduction of 2 students in 2026 (a reduction of about 3.8%), consistently high Soft Science rankings, high popularity of engineering majors, and an increase in the total number of candidates in the province, it is expected that competition will further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to advance. The predicted minimum ranking is about 378, with a range of 340–416.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Precision Engineering Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top-Notch Plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xu Teli Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Information Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Mechanical-Electrical)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicle Elite Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Science and Materials Elite Class)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 340–416, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than 378 (i.e., a smaller number), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as the Excellence Class and Future Precision Engineering Technology; if your ranking is between 378 and 416, it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 2 majors such as the Xu Teli Elite Class and Information Science and Technology; if your ranking is close to 416, you can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年文科（含历史类）最低位次分别为 319→339→318→367→271，2024 年曾后移至 367 名，2025 年大幅前移至 271 名（前移约 96 名），波动较大，2025 年基准位次约 271 名；本省文科招生计划 2021–2023 年均为 9 人，2024 年增至 15 人，2025 年（历史类）14 人，2026 年16 人，呈扩招趋势。扩招意味着名额增加，竞争略有缓和，位次数字有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京理工大学为 985、211、双一流高校，软科排名全国第 13–14 位，虽以理工见长，但作为顶尖高校对文科生同样具有品牌吸引力；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（师德师风事件），但整体舆情应对及时；抖音热度排名第 47 位（较热），对文科报考影响有限；虽以工科为主，但工商管理（A-）、管理科学与工程（A）等经管类学科实力不俗，与文科招生专业（社会科学试验班人文 社科方向/管理与经济方向）有一定关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、经济学等文科相关专业热度分化观望，整体平稳；内蒙古 2026 年考生总人数增加，按近年历史类占比约 28% 估算约 4.3 万人，较 2025 年历史类 3.26 万人有所增加，竞争基数扩大；北京理工大学位于北京市，对内蒙古文科考生具有较强地域吸引力；文科招生人数较少（14–16 人），属于小规模招生，位次波动相对较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 271 名、2026 年计划扩招 2 人（扩招约 14.3%）、本省考生总数增加等因素，预计 2026 年竞争略有缓和，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约 283 名，区间 255–311 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 255–311 名内，建议以社会科学试验班（管理与经济方向）为主力、人文社科方向为冲刺。位次优于 283 名（即数字更小）可重点考虑人文社科方向（含法学方向）；位次在 283–311 名之间建议以管理与经济方向为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were 319→339→318→367→271 respectively. In 2024, it moved back to 367th, and in 2025, it moved forward significantly to 271st (a forward shift of about 96 places), showing large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 271st. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 9 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 15 in 2024, 14 (history category) in 2025, and 16 in 2026, showing an expansion trend. Expansion means increased quotas, slightly easing competition, with a tendency for rankings to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 13th–14th nationally by Soft Science. Although it is strong in science and engineering, as a top university it also has brand appeal for liberal arts students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to teacher ethics incidents), but overall public relations response has been timely. Its Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), with limited impact on liberal arts applications. Although primarily engineering-focused, its disciplines such as Business Administration (A-) and Management Science and Engineering (A) are strong, and are related to the liberal arts enrollment majors (Social Science Experimental Class in Humanities/Social Sciences direction and Management and Economics direction).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of liberal arts-related majors such as Law and Economics is mixed and generally stable. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia increased. Based on the recent historical category proportion of about 28%, it is estimated to be around 43,000, up from 32,600 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Inner Mongolia liberal arts examinees. The number of liberal arts admissions is small (14–16 students), making it a small-scale enrollment, with relatively large ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 271st, the 2026 plan to expand enrollment by 2 students (an increase of about 14.3%), and the increase in the total number of examinees in the province, competition is expected to ease slightly in 2026, with rankings moving back a bit. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 283rd, with a range of 255–311.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Humanities and Social Sciences Direction) (including Law, Law with AI Dual Degree, and Law Joint Training with China University of Political Science and Law).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Management and Economics Direction) (including Business Administration with Digital Innovation Management Direction, Business Administration with AI Dual Degree, Economics, and International Economics and Trade).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- None at present.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 255–311, it is recommended to focus on the Social Science Experimental Class (Management and Economics Direction) as the main choice, with the Humanities and Social Sciences Direction as a reach. If your ranking is better than 283 (i.e., a smaller number), you can prioritize the Humanities and Social Sciences Direction (including Law). If your ranking is between 283 and 311, it is recommended to focus on the Management and Economics Direction.
